codeReview.summary: The worker successfully implemented all 6 requested Zod v4 schemas (`DocumentContentSchema`, `RevisionSchema`, `NavigationNodeSchema`, `ReleaseVersionSchema`, `SpaceSchema`, `AssetSchema`) in the `packages/contracts` directory. The worker effectively used `z.lazy` to build recursive block structures for `DocumentContentSchema`, and updated the slug validations as requested. Unit tests are comprehensive and verify success and failure paths as well as deep nesting scenarios.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker identified pre-existing lint warnings in the repository related to unused variables in `e2e/validator-public-docs-group-1.spec.ts` and `e2e/validator-public-docs-group-2.spec.ts`.

summary: Review passed successfully. All requested schemas and corresponding test coverages were implemented accurately according to requirements.
